questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Join Internals?
options: Inefficient scaling of INNER JOIN, LEFT/RIGHT OUTER, FULL OUTER join execution paths.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of INNER JOIN, LEFT/RIGHT OUTER, FULL OUTER join execution paths.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how INNER JOIN, LEFT/RIGHT OUTER, FULL OUTER join execution paths scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
